EFT — Quest Maps

scroll to zoom · drag to pan · hover markers · checkbox = show/hide · click a row = highlight

Quests with fixed locations

Checkbox = show/hide a quest's markers · click the row = highlight. Colour = trader. Positions are anchored to named landmarks and are approximate; items themselves aren't drawn on the map. "(approx)" flags a spot I couldn't pin precisely.

Kill / map-wide tasks (no single spot)

▾ Good keys — top keys for this map

The most valuable / most-used keys on this map (loot rooms, safes, quest access). Source: community key guides — see footer.
Maps: community SVGs from the tarkov.dev / the-hideout project. Quest data: Official EFT Wiki, TarkovHead, GameMaps & community guides. Lighthouse, Streets & the fixed-location Customs quests are fact-checked; other maps are seeded and being verified. Landmark-anchored approximations — verify in-game. Key picks adapted from gameslikefinder.com's best-Tarkov-keys guide + community sources.
